titleStmt.title: SII 31.44: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 44. (A.R. No. B 233 of 1938.) GAṄGAVARAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in behind Aṁkālamma shrine.
It is dated Śaka 1179, Piṅgala, Āshāḍha. śu. 15, Thursday corresponding to 13, Wednesday, 1257 A.D. f.d.t. °74.

Slightly damaged. It records the tax free gift of the village Gaṅgāpuram in Mulikināḍu for the maintenance of aṅga-raṁga bhōgas to the god Pushpēśvara mahādēva at Pushpagiri by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gaṅgayasāhiṇi and his wife Kamalādēvi to Īśānagurudēva. It is further stated the Īśānagurudēva should act as spiritual leader in all times and the mahājanas received the vṟittis, probably for maintenance of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīŌṁnamaḥ śivāya . namastuṁga śira
cchuṁbi caṁdracāmaravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svastisamastamahīmaṁḍaḷa
rājādhirāja rājaparamēsva(śva)ra kākete puravarādhī
svaraśrīsvayaṁbhudēvaradivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka calama¨rttigaṁḍa mūru
rāya jagadaḷarāya śrīmatugaṇapatidēvamahārājula nija
rājyāmaṁduśrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara
maṁḍa śrīgaṇapatirā
ya mūrurāya jaga
daḷaśrīmatugaṁgapeṁḍera gaṁgayasāhiṇi tasya¨rddhāṁgi
lakṣmīkāmalābāyi sakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1176 Agu piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa suddha 15 guruvā
ramunāṁḍu puṣpagiri dēvarakunu Aṁga
raṁga bhōgānaku mulikināṭī sīmalōnanu gaṁgāpuramu
Iśāṁnya gurudēvaraku Āsdhāna dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁbusēsiri sa
¨rvvabādhāpariharamugānu stānānākunu Anēka kāla kālaṁ
tarānakuṁnnu [Ī]śānagurudēvara dīkṣā putrulē O
ḍayalai naḍapaṁgalavāru . pratiṣṭhā samayamaṁdu vri
tti sēviṁcu koṁnna mahājanāla nāmāṁkitamu .
Digital edition of SII 31.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
